_meta.cost_formula: cost = ((input_tokens - cached_input_tokens) * input + cached_input_tokens * cached_input + output_tokens * output) / 1e6
notes: scorecard metrics.input_tokens INCLUDES metrics.cached_input_tokens; the uncached remainder is billed at the input rate and the cached portion at the cached_input rate.
metrics.total_tokens = input_tokens + output_tokens, so reasoning_tokens are billed within output_tokens and are NOT added separately.
keys match scorecard harness.codex_model; model_label and slug are also tried as fallbacks.
prices are standard/on-demand per-1M-token API rates, not batch/flex/priority tiers.

claude-sonnet-5.note: intro pricing through 2026-08-31; reverts to 3.00/0.30/3.75 on 2026-09-01

glm-5.1.note: same per-token rates as glm-5.2 per Z.AI pricing

glm-4.7.note: Z.AI official rate; third-party resellers (e.g. DeepInfra) list lower

gemini-3.5-flash-low.note: Google Gemini 3.5 Flash rate; run via Antigravity OAuth (thinking tier fixed in model id)
